description: Технический аудит с ИИ-помощником
Air-gapped OCP with Isovalent Networking for Kubernetes

swarm-external-secrets GSoC 2026 prototype — full test run (41 passed, 0 failed)  Tests cover: - 1Password Connect provider (vault/item resolution, field extraction, mTLS) - Doppler provider (service token auth, secret retrieval, rotation polling) - Infisical provider (Universal Auth, token refresh on 401, rotation polling) - PushSecret to Vault (bidirectional sync) - Secret versioning (GetSecretVersion across all providers) - Error handling across all providers  All tests use local mock HTTP servers — no external accounts or credentials required.  Prototype repository: https://github.com/vaishakh787/osl-prototype
